name: douyin-scraper
description: Search Douyin (抖音) videos by natural language keywords. Supports phrases like '搜索一下海鲜视频'. Falls back to keyword suggestions when not logged in.
author: qclawbot

capabilities.natural_language_search: Accept natural language like '搜索一下海鲜视频' and extract keywords to search Douyin
capabilities.persistent_login: Browser profile persists login state — login once, search forever
capabilities.suggestion_fallback: When not logged in, provide keyword suggestions via Douyin's suggestion API
capabilities.structured_results: Return structured video results with author, likes, comments, play count, and URL

audience: Anyone who wants to search Douyin without opening the app
